calendar.matters:
HEARING ON ROBERT GOMEZ, JR.'S PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-29-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for Change of Name and Gender of Petitioner Robert Gomez, Jr..

Dept. 505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K.Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:12:26 a.m. and concluding at 9:18:19 a.m.(D505)

Petitioner Robert Gomez, Jr., appeared in pro per, was placed under oath and testified.

Petition for change of name and gender filed July 11, 2023.
Order to Show cause filed July 11, 2023.
Notice of hearing filed October 30, 2023.

The Court addresses the Petitioner.

Petitioner provides testimony.

After reviewing the petition, hearing the testimony and there are no objections filed, The Court grants Petitioner's request for change of name and gender.

Order Recognizing change of gender and sex identifier and for name change and for issuance of new certificates signed and filed this day.
